headline: Market Share Gains Assert The Lovesac Company (LOVE) as a Top High Growth Micro-Cap Stock
summary: The Lovesac Company (NASDAQ:LOVE) is a high-growth micro-cap stock to buy now. On June 11, Lovesac (NASDAQ:LOVE) delivered solid first-quarter results for fiscal 2027, driven by modest market-share gains and disciplined execution. Net sales in the quarter were down by 0.1% year over year to $138.2 million. The slight decline was driven by the closure […]
